{{Quote|Not a bad little hunk of machinery.|Han Solo, to Tenel Ka Djo|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Rock Dragon''''' was a [[Hapan]] ship that belonged to [[Tenel Ka Djo]]. Her parents and grandmother, [[Ta'a Chume]], sent it to her as a gift in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]] when she was training at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. She chose her Jedi friends [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Lowbacca]] to be the ship's pilot and co-pilot. Although ''Rock Dragon'' followed the common Hapan theme of dragon-related names, Tenel Ka actually named it after an [[Rock dragon|animal]] from [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Visually, it was a rather plain ship as to not draw unwanted attention to Tenel Ka, being the heir to the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].

The ''Rock Dragon'' served as Tenel Ka's personal ship, but was captained by Jaina. It took Jaina, Lowbacca, Tenel Ka, and Jacen on their missions, most notably against the [[Diversity Alliance]]. It was attacked by [[Ailyn Vel]], who had assumed the identity of her [[Boba Fett/Legends|father]], in the remains of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. [[Zekk]] showed up in his ship, ''[[Lightning Rod]]'', and chased Vel deeper into the asteroid field.
